/usr/bin/ar qc libvireon.a CMakeFiles/vireon.dir/src/engine/audioManager/audioManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vireon.dir/src/engine/engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vireon.dir/src/engine/entityManager/entityManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vireon.dir/src/engine/glyphManager/glyphManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vireon.dir/src/engine/glyphManager/glyphMap/glyphMap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vireon.dir/src/engine/graphics/batchManager/batch/batch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vireon.dir/src/engine/graphics/batchManager/batchManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vireon.dir/src/engine/graphics/gpuBuffers/elementBuffer/elementBuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vireon.dir/src/engine/graphics/gpuBuffers/gpuBuffers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vireon.dir/src/engine/graphics/gpuBuffers/vertexArray/vertexArray.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vireon.dir/src/engine/graphics/gpuBuffers/vertexBuffer/vertexBuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vireon.dir/src/engine/graphics/renderer/renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vireon.dir/src/engine/graphics/shaderManager/shader/shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vireon.dir/src/engine/graphics/shaderManager/shaderManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vireon.dir/src/engine/graphics/vertex/vertex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vireon.dir/src/engine/materialManager/material/texture/texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vireon.dir/src/engine/meshManager/meshManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vireon.dir/src/engine/sceneManager/sceneManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vireon.dir/src/engine/scheduleManager/scheduleManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vireon.dir/src/game/game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vireon.dir/src/platform/input/inputHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vireon.dir/src/platform/window/GLFWwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vireon.dir/src/utils/file/fileIO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vireon.dir/src/utils/idManager/idManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vireon.dir/src/utils/logger/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vireon.dir/src/utils/spatialMap/spatialMap.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libvireon.a
